name: pathPlan
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || typeof output.result.estimatedTime === 'string'
output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || typeof output.result.collisionCheck === 'string'
_note: Pure compute, reads artifact.data.waypoints. Field-aligned 2026-06-28 to RoboticsActionPanel.tsx: the path card renders waypoints / totalDistance / estimatedTime / collisionCheck EXACTLY. totalDistance = sum of euclidean 3D segment lengths (1dp); estimatedTime derived at 100mm/s; segments[].{from,to,distance}. Fail-CLOSED: non-finite coords default to 0 via Number.isFinite so totalDistance is always finite. Fewer than 2 waypoints (or a non-array) returns the honest 'Add at least 2 waypoints' message, never throws.
